tools.name: get_latest_rates
tools.description: Get the latest aggregated exchange rates for a base asset (crypto or fiat) against one or more quote currencies, including 24h percent change. Rates are aggregated by median across multiple sources (Binance, Kraken, Coinbase, OKX, Bybit, WhiteBIT, NBU, ECB and others).

tools.name: convert_currency
tools.description: Convert an amount between any two supported currencies (crypto or fiat). Uses the direct pair when available, otherwise bridges through USD/USDT/UAH/EUR.

tools.name: get_rate_history
tools.description: Get historical OHLC (open/high/low/close) candles for a currency pair over a period.

tools.name: get_service_status
tools.description: Get PriceFeed service health: data source statuses, cache health and the list of supported currency pairs.
